sourceTitle: Aligning our assessments to the age of generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Except for supervised examinations and supervised in-semester tests, students may use automated writing tools or generative artificial intelligence to complete assessments, unless expressly prohibited by the unit of study coordinator.
evidenceLocator: Semester 1 2025 section, “Allowable assistance” in the Academic Integrity Policy
